    Index

    C I M S 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages

    S

    setAddQuestion(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    If the programmer only wants to ask for a "value" instead of a "question", this text has to be set.
    setAskAgain(boolean) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    If askAgain is false, the user is asked only once.
    setDTFormatError(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a date or time while using intput-Date and/or -Time.
    setNumberFormatError(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.tbz.lib.Input
    This message is shown to the user, if she/he does not enter a number while using "intputInt()" or "inputDouble()".
    C I M S
